main.name: Xyris, the Writhing Storm
main.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever an opponent draws a card except the first one they draw in each of their draw steps, create a 1/1 green Snake creature token.
Whenever Xyris deals combat damage to a player, you and that player each draw that many cards.

card.name: Wheel of Fate
card.oracle_text:
Suspend 4—{1}{R} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, pay {1}{R} and exile it with four time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.)
Each player discards their hand, then draws seven cards.

card.name: Forbidden Orchard
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
Whenever you tap this land for mana, target opponent creates a 1/1 colorless Spirit creature token.

card.name: Heartbeat of Spring
card.oracle_text: Whenever a player taps a land for mana, that player adds one mana of any type that land produced.
card.flavor_text:
"It is true that we monks hold the key to paradise, but most don't understand that the paradise we guard is the one within."
—Diary of Azusa

card.name: Font of Mythos
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of each player's draw step, that player draws two additional cards.
card.flavor_text: Those who drink from Malfegor's cup are tainted with hunger and stained with lies.

card.name: Cryptolith Rite
card.oracle_text: Creatures you control have "{T}: Add one mana of any color."
card.flavor_text: The chant was incomprehensible, but its power was unmistakable.

card.name: Fevered Visions
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of each player's end step, that player draws a card. If the player is your opponent and has four or more cards in hand, this enchantment deals 2 damage to that player.
card.flavor_text: The mind can only expand so far before it flies apart.

card.name: Misty Rainforest
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Forest or Island card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Scalding Tarn
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for an Island or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Molten Psyche
card.oracle_text:
Each player shuffles the cards from their hand into their library, then draws that many cards.
Metalcraft — If you control three or more artifacts, Molten Psyche deals damage to each opponent equal to the number of cards that player has drawn this turn.

card.name: Wild Evocation
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player reveals a card at random from their hand. If it's a land card, the player puts it onto the battlefield. Otherwise, the player casts it without paying its mana cost if able.

card.name: Howling Mine
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of each player's draw step, if this artifact is untapped, that player draws an additional card.
card.flavor_text: Legend has it that the mine howls out the last words of those who died inside.

card.name: Eladamri's Vineyard
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of each player's first main phase, that player adds {G}{G}.
card.flavor_text: The mushroom wine made Gerrard's head spin, and his stomach soon followed suit.

card.name: Dictate of Kruphix
card.oracle_text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
At the beginning of each player's draw step, that player draws an additional card.
card.flavor_text: "Knowledge is cruel. It will break your heart and test your allegiances. Are you certain you want this curse?"

card.name: Steam Vents
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {U} or {R}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
card.flavor_text: Crafted with genius, energized with madness.

card.name: Scrambleverse
card.oracle_text: For each nonland permanent, choose a player at random. Then each player gains control of each permanent for which they were chosen. Untap those permanents.
card.flavor_text: Sometimes a little chaos is in order.

card.name: Time Reversal
card.oracle_text: Each player shuffles their hand and graveyard into their library, then draws seven cards. Exile Time Reversal.
card.flavor_text:
"Any oaf can conquer a kingdom. It takes true power to conquer time."
—Shai Fusan, archmage

card.name: Kami of the Crescent Moon
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of each player's draw step, that player draws an additional card.
card.flavor_text:
"He's a lot like me, that masterless little kami . . . unimpressed by grandeur and never at a loss for a trick."
—Toshiro Umezawa

card.name: Show and Tell
card.oracle_text: Each player may put an artifact, creature, enchantment, or land card from their hand onto the battlefield.
card.flavor_text: At the academy, "show and tell" too often becomes "run and hide."

card.name: Lightning Greaves
card.oracle_text:
Equipped creature has haste and shroud. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities.)
Equip {0}
card.flavor_text: After lightning struck the cliffs, the ore became iron, the iron became steel, and the steel became greaves. The lightning never left.

card.name: Well of Ideas
card.oracle_text:
When this enchantment enters, draw two cards.
At the beginning of each other player's draw step, that player draws an additional card.
At the beginning of your draw step, draw two additional cards.

card.name: Ketria Triome
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {G}, {U}, or {R}.)
This land enters tapped.
Cycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Three Visits
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"Trying to meet a worthy man in the wrong way is as bad as closing the door on an invited guest."
—Mencius, a Chinese philosopher

card.name: Eye of the Storm
card.oracle_text: Whenever a player casts an instant or sorcery card, exile it. Then that player copies each instant or sorcery card exiled with this enchantment. For each copy, the player may cast the copy without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Hypergenesis
card.oracle_text:
Suspend 3—{1}{G}{G}
Starting with you, each player may put an artifact, creature, enchantment, or land card from their hand onto the battlefield. Repeat this process until no one puts a card onto the battlefield.

card.name: Burning Inquiry
card.oracle_text: Each player draws three cards, then discards three cards at random.
card.flavor_text: Jariad burned the midnight oil, burned through scroll after scroll, and then burned down his laboratory.

card.name: Hive Mind
card.oracle_text: Whenever a player casts an instant or sorcery spell, each other player copies that spell. Each of those players may choose new targets for their copy.
card.flavor_text:
"All consciousness is one, separated only by a thin veil of the physical."
—Jace Beleren

card.name: Warp World
card.oracle_text: Each player shuffles all permanents they own into their library, then reveals that many cards from the top of their library. Each player puts all artifact, creature, and land cards revealed this way onto the battlefield, then does the same for enchantment cards, then puts all cards revealed this way that weren't put onto the battlefield on the bottom of their library.

card.name: Wooded Foothills
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Mountain or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Where dragons' breath once burned, their bones now freeze.

card.name: The Great Aurora
card.oracle_text: Each player shuffles all cards from their hand and all permanents they own into their library, then draws that many cards. Each player may put any number of land cards from their hand onto the battlefield. Exile The Great Aurora.

card.name: Whims of the Fates
card.oracle_text: Starting with you, each player separates all permanents they control into three piles. Then each player chooses one of their piles at random and sacrifices those permanents. (Piles can be empty.)

card.name: Jace's Archivist
card.oracle_text: {U}, {T}: Each player discards their hand, then draws cards equal to the greatest number of cards a player discarded this way.
card.flavor_text: "This is a sacred duty. Master Beleren's trust has bought an eternity of my loyalty."

card.name: Possibility Storm
card.oracle_text: Whenever a player casts a spell from their hand, that player exiles it, then exiles cards from the top of their library until they exile a card that shares a card type with it. That player may cast that card without paying its mana cost. Then they put all cards exiled with this enchantment on the bottom of their library in a random order.

card.name: Braids, Conjurer Adept
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player may put an artifact, creature, or land card from their hand onto the battlefield.
card.flavor_text: The rifted multiverse became a sea of conflicting realities, each peopled by possible versions of every living being.

card.name: Confusion in the Ranks
card.oracle_text: Whenever an artifact, creature, or enchantment enters, its controller chooses target permanent another player controls that shares a card type with it. Exchange control of those permanents.

card.name: Rejuvenating Springs
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Kodama of the East Tree
card.oracle_text:
Reach
Whenever another permanent you control enters, if it wasn't put onto the battlefield with this ability, you may put a permanent card with equal or lesser mana value from your hand onto the battlefield.
Partner (You can have two commanders if both have partner.)

card.name: Pendant of Prosperity
card.oracle_text:
This artifact enters under the control of an opponent of your choice.
{2}, {T}: Draw a card, then you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield. This artifact's owner draws a card, then that player may put a land card from their hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Nature's Lore
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a Forest card, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: "Greetings, tired traveler."

card.name: Glimpse of Tomorrow
card.oracle_text:
Suspend 3—{R}{R}
Shuffle all permanents you own into your library, then reveal that many cards from the top of your library. Put all non-Aura permanent cards revealed this way onto the battlefield, then do the same for Aura cards, then put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Goblin Anarchomancer
card.oracle_text: Each spell you cast that's red or green costs {1} less to cast.
card.flavor_text: A good Gruul shaman can work a whole clan into a frenzy. A great one will wait until the enemy's nearby.

card.name: Thieves' Auction
card.oracle_text: Exile all nontoken permanents. Starting with you, each player chooses one of the exiled cards and puts it onto the battlefield tapped under their control. Repeat this process until all cards exiled this way have been chosen.

card.name: Breeding Pool
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {G} or {U}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Stomping Ground
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {R} or {G}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.set_name: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
card.name: Spire Garden
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.set_name: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
card.name: Jaheira, Friend of the Forest
card.oracle_text:
Tokens you control have "{T}: Add {G}."
Choose a Background (You can have a Background as a second commander.)

card.set_name: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
card.name: Wild Magic Surge
card.oracle_text: Destroy target permanent an opponent controls. Its controller reveals cards from the top of their library until they reveal a permanent card that shares a card type with that permanent. They put that card onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of their library in a random order.

card.name: Reliquary Tower
card.oracle_text:
You have no maximum hand size.
{T}: Add {C}.
card.flavor_text:
"Let the others bicker over their little worlds and stars. I have an empire of knowledge, and it encompasses all others."
—Trazyn the Infinite

card.name: Teferi's Puzzle Box
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of each player's draw step, that player puts the cards in their hand on the bottom of their library in any order, then draws that many cards.

card.name: Over the Top
card.oracle_text: Each player reveals a number of cards from the top of their library equal to the number of nonland permanents they control, puts all permanent cards they revealed this way onto the battlefield, and puts the rest into their graveyard.

card.name: Winds of Change
card.oracle_text: Each player shuffles the cards from their hand into their library, then draws that many cards.
card.flavor_text: Sometimes, a butterfly flapping its wings is insufficient.

card.name: Mystical Tutor
card.oracle_text: Search your library for an instant or sorcery card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.
card.flavor_text: Wisdom is a well that never runs dry. It offers the most to those with the deepest thirst for knowledge.

card.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
card.name: Elven Chorus
card.oracle_text:
You may look at the top card of your library any time.
You may cast creature spells from the top of your library.
Creatures you control have "{T}: Add one mana of any color."
card.flavor_text: "A Elbereth Gilthoniel, silivren penna míriel o menel aglar elenath!"

card.name: Reflecting Pool
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any type that a land you control could produce.
card.flavor_text:
"This is the Window of the Sunset, fairest of all the falls of Ithilien, land of many fountains."
—Faramir

card.name: Cultivate
card.oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: All seeds share a common bond, calling to each other across infinity.

card.name: Guff Rewrites History
card.oracle_text: For each player, choose target nonenchantment, nonland permanent that player controls. Those permanents' owners shuffle them into their libraries. Each player who controlled one of those permanents exiles cards from the top of their library until they exile a nonland card, then puts the rest on the bottom of their library in a random order. Each player may cast the nonland card they exiled without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Training Center
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {U} or {R}.
card.flavor_text:
"Sometimes you just need to be inspired by a massive explosion or a color that didn't exist five seconds ago."
—Rootha, Prismari mage-student

card.name: Mana Flare
card.oracle_text: Whenever a player taps a land for mana, that player adds one mana of any type that land produced.
card.flavor_text:
"I give my heart to the mountain, my memories to the wind. Let my last moment be burned into history."
—*Daughters of Flame*

card.name: Impact Tremors
card.oracle_text: Whenever a creature you control enters, this enchantment deals 1 damage to each opponent.
card.flavor_text:
"With tears in his smoke-scorched eyes, he watched the living flames consume the only home he'd ever known."
—*The Apprentice's Folly*

card.name: Command Tower
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text:
"New Vegas is more than a city—it's the remedy to mankind's derailment."
—Mr. House

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Growth Spiral
card.oracle_text: Draw a card. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.
card.flavor_text: Cyclical and spiral patterns are the specialty of the Gyre Clade, which seeks to revitalize the cycles of nature.

card.name: Toski, Bearer of Secrets
card.oracle_text:
This spell can't be countered.
Indestructible
Toski attacks each combat if able.
Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Exotic Orchard
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.
card.flavor_text: Orwell Orchards is about as peaceful and pleasant as a tomb can get.

card.name: Mossfire Valley
card.flavor_text:
"I come from a place far to the northwest. It's called The Pitt. It's ... well ... let's be honest ... a nightmare."
—Wernher

card.name: Mind's Dilation
card.oracle_text: Whenever an opponent casts their first spell each turn, that player exiles the top card of their library. If it's a nonland card, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.
card.flavor_text: Infinite wisdom cannot be contained within a single mind.

card.name: Windfall
card.oracle_text: Each player discards their hand, then draws cards equal to the greatest number of cards a player discarded this way.
card.flavor_text: "Rich" is a relative term.

card.name: Yavimaya Coast
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {G} or {U}. This land deals 1 damage to you.
card.flavor_text: As magnigoth trees expanded across the sea into Almaaz and New Argive, it became clear Yavimaya's borders were never confined by its coastline.

card.name: Flooded Grove
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{G/U}, {T}: Add {G}{G}, {G}{U}, or {U}{U}.
card.flavor_text: At full moon, the river seeps over its banks and crawls through the woods like a blanket of serpents.

card.name: Fabled Passage
card.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Then if you control four or more lands, untap that land.
card.flavor_text: Beyond Valley lies danger—and promise.

card.name: Rites of Flourishing
card.oracle_text:
At the beginning of each player's draw step, that player draws an additional card.
Each player may play an additional land on each of their turns.
card.flavor_text: To practice synergy, many frogfolk elementalists find joy in cleansing rivers and ponds together.

card.name: Agate Instigator
card.oracle_text:
Offspring {1}{R} (You may pay an additional {1}{R} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.)
Whenever another creature you control enters, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Hinterland Harbor
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control a Forest or an Island.
{T}: Add {G} or {U}.
card.flavor_text:
"Our ancestors brought down a Phyrexian portal ship, then built our town on its hull. We're pretty proud of that."
—Alene of Riverspan

card.name: Echo of Eons
card.oracle_text:
Each player shuffles their hand and graveyard into their library, then draws seven cards.
Flashback {2}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Enduring Vitality
card.oracle_text:
Vigilance
Creatures you control have "{T}: Add one mana of any color."
When Enduring Vitality dies, if it was a creature, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. It's an enchantment. (It's not a creature.)

card.name: Rampant Growth
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Nature grows solutions to its problems.

card.name: Chaos Warp
card.oracle_text: The owner of target permanent shuffles it into their library, then reveals the top card of their library. If it's a permanent card, they put it onto the battlefield.

card.name: Rhythm of the Wild
card.oracle_text:
Creature spells you control can't be countered.
Nontoken creatures you control have riot. (They enter with your choice of a +1/+1 counter or haste.)
card.flavor_text: Throughout his adventures with the X-Men, Logan regularly returned to run with his first true family.

card.name: Reforge the Soul
card.oracle_text:
Each player discards their hand, then draws seven cards.
Miracle {1}{R} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)
card.flavor_text: In a wave of spells called the Cursemute, Avacyn cleansed the world with divine fire.

card.name: Karplusan Forest
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}. This land deals 1 damage to you.
card.flavor_text: Between jagged, snowcapped peaks, the dense bands of hardy evergreens provide the perfect cover for roving bands of orc and goblin raiders.

card.name: Transforming Flourish
card.oracle_text:
Demonstrate (When you cast this spell, you may copy it. If you do, choose an opponent to also copy it. Players may choose new targets for their copies.)
Destroy target artifact or creature you don't control. If that permanent is destroyed this way, its controller exiles cards from the top of their library until they exile a nonland card, then they may cast that card without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Selvala's Stampede
card.oracle_text: Council's dilemma — Starting with you, each player votes for wild or free. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card for each wild vote. Put those creature cards onto the battlefield, then shuffle the rest into your library. You may put a permanent card from your hand onto the battlefield for each free vote.

card.name: Farseek
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a Plains, Island, Swamp, or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Supportive Parents
card.oracle_text: Tap two untapped creatures you control: Add one mana of any color.
card.flavor_text:
"Te amamos, mijo."
—Rio Morales

card.set_name: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
card.name: Descent into Avernus
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put two descent counters on this enchantment. Then each player creates X Treasure tokens and this enchantment deals X damage to each player, where X is the number of descent counters on this enchantment.

card.name: Sol Ring
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.
card.flavor_text:
"Model? I'm insulted. It's by all reasonable metrics a fully functional planetary system, scaled down for easier study."
—Urza, to Tawnos

card.name: Kodama's Reach
card.oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"The trees keep our history better than any digital device."
—Satsuki, the Living Lore

card.set_name: March of the Machine: The Aftermath
card.name: Plargg and Nassari
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of your upkeep, each player exiles cards from the top of their library until they exile a nonland card. An opponent chooses a nonland card exiled this way. You may cast up to two spells from among the other cards exiled this way without paying their mana costs.

card.name: Xyris, the Writhing Storm
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever an opponent draws a card except the first one they draw in each of their draw steps, create a 1/1 green Snake creature token.
Whenever Xyris deals combat damage to a player, you and that player each draw that many cards.

tokens.name: Agate Instigator
tokens.oracle_text:
Offspring {1}{R} (You may pay an additional {1}{R} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.)
Whenever another creature you control enters, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

tokens.name: Agate Instigator
tokens.oracle_text:
Whenever another creature you control enters, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.
(This token's mana cost is {1}{R}.)

tokens.name: Command Tower
tokens.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

tokens.name: Gilt-Leaf Alchemist
tokens.oracle_text:
Deathtouch
{T}: Conjure a card named Forest onto the battlefield. Activate only if two or more Elf cards are in your graveyard.

tokens.name: Tower Winder
tokens.oracle_text:
Reach, deathtouch
When this creature enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Command Tower, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle.
tokens.flavor_text: The tower guards eventually gave up, figuring it was better at the job anyway.

tokens.name: Treasure
tokens.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.
